cases.description: 2mo, no doses → D1 of 3 (RotaTeq default, brand-aware)
cases.rationale: CDSI Rotavirus 3-dose D1 minAge=42d (6w). Code line 89 fires am 2-8.

cases.description: 4mo, 2 doses with Rotarix → series complete (Rotarix is 2-dose)
cases.rationale: CDSI Rotavirus 2-dose has 2 doses total. Code line 88 sets rvMax=2 for Rotarix.

cases.description: After 14 weeks 6 days (105d), NEVER start the series
cases.rationale: CDSI Rotavirus D1 maxAge=105d (14w6d). Past this age starting RV is contraindicated. Code line 91 uses am>3.5 → no rec when starting late.

cases.description: After 8 months 0 days (~241d), NEVER give any RV dose
cases.rationale: CDSI Rotavirus all doses maxAge=241d (~8m0d). Code line 89 gates am 2-8, so age 9mo+ correctly produces no rec.
Code line 89 includes !risks.includes('immunocomp') gate. Severe immunodeficiency contraindication for live oral vaccine.
